verification.files_missing_detail: content/ dir, public/sw.js, public/sitemap.xml, public/robots.txt, public/manifest.json — BUT sw.js, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, manifest.json all exist in ROOT instead

critical_issues.issue: Photo Inspector sends image data to /api/ai-proxy in Anthropic format (type:image, source:base64). ai-proxy.js does NOT handle images — it converts m.content as string (line 129). vision-proxy.js EXISTS with correct Gemini vision code but is NEVER called from frontend.
critical_issues.evidence: grep -n 'vision-proxy' index.html → (empty). Line 3993: fetchAnthropicAPI({ model:'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', messages:[{content:[{type:'image'...}]}] }). ai-proxy.js:129: parts:[{text: m.content}] — m.content is array, not string.

critical_issues.issue: 4 Anthropic model references in frontend code. Backend ignores them and uses Gemini. But if backend format ever changes, these hardcoded fake models will cause confusion.
critical_issues.evidence: grep -n 'claude-haiku|claude-sonnet' index.html → 4 matches. ai-proxy.js has ZERO references to claude/anthropic — only gemini.

high_issues.issue: Triple Service Worker registration — line 156 registers /sw.js directly, line 4266 creates Blob SW, line 4282 falls back to sw.js. Three competing registrations can cause cache conflicts and unpredictable behavior.

localStorage still has getProToken() reading qs_pro_token (line 4541). Backend correctly uses httpOnly cookies (verify-pro.js:59), but frontend has legacy localStorage code. cleanupSecurity() removes it on load (line 136), creating a race condition.
high_issues.evidence: grep -n 'localStorage.*pro_token' index.html → lines 4541, 4549. verify-pro.js:59: 'qs_pro=...HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict'

high_issues.issue: fetchAnthropicAPI function name is misleading. Routes to /api/ai-proxy which uses Gemini. Every developer seeing this name will assume Anthropic API is used.
high_issues.evidence: grep -n 'function fetchAnthropicAPI' index.html → line 2231. Function body: fetch('/api/ai-proxy',...). ai-proxy.js uses gemini-2.0-flash.

medium_issues.issue: innerHTML used 42 times. sanitizeText() defined and used only ~6 times. Remaining ~36 inject API responses, translations, or HTML templates without sanitization.
medium_issues.evidence: grep -c 'innerHTML.*=' index.html → 42. grep -c 'sanitizeText' index.html → 6 (includes definition + comment).

medium_issues.issue: Blob manifest AND Blob SW duplicate real files. manifest.json (root) and sw.js (root) exist, but index.html also creates Blob versions. Wastes bytes and creates maintenance confusion.
medium_issues.evidence: Line 4229: new Blob([JSON.stringify(manifestData)]). Line 4266: new Blob([swCode]). Both create Blob URLs that override the real files.

medium_issues.issue: PWA files (sw.js, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, manifest.json) are in root instead of public/ directory. Depends on vercel.json routing config — may work but is non-standard.
medium_issues.evidence: ls public/ → only legal/ directory. ls sw.js sitemap.xml robots.txt manifest.json → all exist in root.

low_issues.issue: content/ directory does not exist. Content stored in data_content*.js files (10 files, ~2.6MB total). Not a bug but differs from v3.0 checklist expectation.
low_issues.evidence: ls content/ → ❌ MISSING. ls data_content*.js → 10 files totaling ~2.6MB.

low_issues.issue: UI warning at line 1154 says 'المفتاح يُخزَّن في localStorage' but saveKey() is in-memory only. Confusing UX message.
low_issues.evidence: Line 1154: 'تنبيه أمان: المفتاح يُخزَّن في localStorage'. Line 1198: 'let anthropicKey = \"\" // Never from localStorage'

score.infrastructure_notes: All API files exist, Gemini backend works, vercel.json configured, export system complete (PDF/Word/Excel). Deducted for triple SW registration and Blob duplication.
score.data_layer_notes: QS_CONTENT defined with 153 sections. 63 calculators all have real logic. 10 content files (~2.6MB). Deducted for no separate content/ directory structure.
score.security_notes: httpOnly cookies on server ✅. But: localStorage legacy getter still exists, 4 fake Anthropic model names confuse audit trail, innerHTML not consistently sanitized (36/42 unsanitized), vision endpoint sends to wrong handler.
score.content_notes: 153 content sections, 63 calculators, export templates, Google Analytics, full SEO. Deducted for broken Photo Inspector and misleading code comments.

recommendations: Execute Phase 2 IMMEDIATELY: Fix vision routing (index.html:3993 → vision-proxy.js instead of ai-proxy.js). This is the only fully broken feature.
Execute Phase 2: Remove all 4 Anthropic model references and rename fetchAnthropicAPI → fetchAIProxy. Evidence: 4 grep matches for claude-haiku/claude-sonnet.
Execute Phase 2: Consolidate SW registration to single path (remove line 156 duplicate, remove Blob SW, use real sw.js only).
Execute Phase 2: Remove legacy localStorage getProToken()/setProActive() — httpOnly cookie is the real auth path.
Execute Phase 3: Audit all 42 innerHTML assignments and add sanitizeText() where user/API data is injected.
